mapper.select: select * from post where create_time>=DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 20 DAY) order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select p.id,p.title,p.context,p.user_id as userId, p.create_time as createTime, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, u.username as authorName from post p left join user u on u.id=p.user_id where p.id=#{postId}
mapper.update: update post set title=#{title}, context=#{context},comment_count=#{commentCount},like_count=#{likeCount} where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from post where title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')
select id as postId, (like_count*2+comment_count*3)/ (pow(DATEDIFF(NOW(),create_time)+2,0.5)) as score from post where create_time>=DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 7 DAY) order by score desc limit 10

select * from post where id in
#{postId}
select id from post where user_id=#{userId}
